data.name: Please Note: System generated User Role cant be edited or deleted
data.value: Please Note: System generated User Role cant be edited or deleted

data.name: Select the Inks to be assigned to this press
data.value: Select the Inks to be assigned to this press

data.name: Send all emails via your preferred local email client [Outlook, Lotus...]1
data.value: Send all emails via your preferred local email client [Outlook, Lotus...]

data.name: You will not be able to alter these numbers again without contacting
data.value: You will not be able to alter these numbers again without contacting

data.name: Please enter Max. no. of Sheets
data.value: Please enter Max. no. of Sheets

data.name: Open the Suppliers Inventory CSV file
data.value: Open the Suppliers Inventory CSV file

data.name: Use this type of guillotine where you are only able to cut one item at a time (Not suitable for sheet fed digital or offset printing)
data.value: Use this type of guillotine where you are only able to cut one item at a time (Not suitable for sheet fed digital or offset printing)

data.name: An Estimate is Progressed to a Job
data.value: An Estimate is progressed to a Job

Minimum Sheet Size for
the plant
data.value:
Minimum Sheet Size for
the plant

data.name: Jobs value should not be blank
data.value: Jobs value should not be blank

data.name: Delivery value should not be blank
data.value: Delivery value should not be blank

data.name: Use this type of matrix when you want to sell the items in packs of a fixed quantity eg
data.value: Use this type of matrix when you want to sell the items in packs of a fixed quantity eg

data.name: Use this type of matrix when you want to sell the items in flexible quantities eg
data.value: Use this type of matrix when you want to sell the items in flexible quantities eg

data.name: Add stock back to the inventory, if the stock is already been reduced
data.value: Add stock back to the inventory, if the stock is already been reduced

data.name: To select the paper, Please click on the code/Name
data.value: To select the paper, Please click on the code/Name

data.name: Please select this box if you want eprint to price paper in estimates based on a whole pack by default
data.value: Please select this box if you want eprint to price paper in estimates based on a whole pack by default

data.name: should be in the same order as the sample file
data.value: should be in the same order as the sample file

data.name: support@eprintsoftware.com as alterations to the numbering seqence can cause duplicate numbers in estimates etc.
data.value: support@eprintsoftware.com as alterations to the numbering seqence can cause duplicate numbers in estimates etc.

data.name: Select the data(s) below you wish to import from
data.value: Select the data(s) below you wish to import from

data.name: Please select file name for import
data.value: Please select file name for import

data.name: Note: When you have to set your custom numbering click the save and lock button.
data.value: Note: When you have to set your custom numbering click the save and lock button.

data.name: This option is available only for users who have opted for Inventory Management
data.value: This option is available only for users who have opted for Inventory Management

data.name: Send all emails via your preferred local email client [Outlook, Lotus...]
data.value: Send all emails via your preferred local email client [Outlook, Lotus...]

data.name: Templates attached to the emails will appear as a web link within the body of the email
data.value: Templates attached to the emails will appear as a web link within the body of the email

data.name: Make the first file upload mandatory
data.value: Make the first file upload mandatory

data.name: Changes made to the job card settings will only apply to job cards created after the change to the settings
data.value: Changes made to the job card settings will only apply to job cards created after the change to the settings

data.name: Please Note System generated User Role cant be edited or deleted
data.value: Please Note System generated User Role cant be edited or deleted

data.name: This prevents the start of an item description appearing on onepage and the rest of the item description appearing on the next page
data.value: This prevents the start of an item description appearing on onepage and the rest of the item description appearing on the next page

data.name: Rate for Black & White Chargeable Sheets
data.value: Rate for Black & White Chargeable Sheets

data.name: In case of cancellation of Job
data.value: In case of cancellation of Job

data.name: This is the default super admin access to the system and hence cannot be changed
data.value: This is the default super admin access to the system and hence cannot be changed

data.name: Filter the list below based on your keyword match
data.value: Filter the list below based on your keyword match

data.name: Select the Stock Category and Sub Category
data.value: Select the Stock Category and Sub Category

data.name: Once per day until the stock is replenished
data.value: Once per day until the stock is replenished

data.name: Prompt user Do you want inventory adjusted if any to be added back to the system
data.value: Prompt user=" Do you want inventory adjusted if any to be added back to the system?"

data.value: Set this as starting value for the Estimates, Jobs, Purchases, Invoices and Delivery:

data.name: Activate the zone buildup calculation method
data.value: Activate the zone buildup calculation method

data.name: should be in the same order as the sample file..
data.value: should be in the same order as the sample file..

data.name: Invoices value should not be blank
data.value: Invoices value should not be blank

data.name: Check this box to flatten the click charge b/w click zones
data.value: Check this box to flatten the click charge b/w click zones

data.name: Max no. of Sheets that fit in the throat for the above paper weight
data.value: Max no. of Sheets that fit in the throat for the above paper weight

data.name: No, not add the stock back to the inventory
data.value: No, not add the stock back to the inventory

data.value: Please enter No. of Chargeable Sheets

data.name: How many metres can you print per hour
data.value: How many metres can you print per hour

data.name: email address for alerts to be sent to
data.value: Email Address for alerts to be sent to

data.name: Prompt user to decide whether he/she wants to stock add back to the system
data.value: Prompt user to decide whether he/she wants to stock add back to the system

data.name: Note: Populate the table with the typical run speed that you will achieve for the paper weight and size of the jobs print run. For example if at. Perhaps 6,000 per hour? eprint will use this information in conjunction with the Hourly Press Charge to calculate the Press cost for the estimate or job.
data.value: Note: Populate the table with the typical run speed that you will achieve for the paper weight and size of the jobs print run. For example if at. Perhaps 6,000 per hour? eprint will use this information in conjunction with the Hourly Press Charge to calculate the Press cost for the estimate or job.

data.name: When Job is Progressed to an Invoice
data.value: When Job is progressed to an Invoice

data.name: When Job Status is changed to
data.value: When Job status is changed to

data.name: Do not add stock back to the inventory
data.value: Do not add stock back to the inventory

data.name: Hide the markup profit margin of Gross profit fields from the user
data.value: Hide the markup profit margin of Gross profit fields from the user

data.name: Add stock back to the inventory, if the stock has already been reduced
data.value: Add stock back to the inventory, if the stock has already been reduced

data.name: Check the inputs you have given & then click on the submit button
data.value: Check the inputs you have given & then click on the submit button

data.name: Use the toolbar at the top of the page for more editing options
data.value: Use the toolbar at the top of the page for more editing options

data.name: (Note: Please contact your press supplier or calculate yourself the correct yield that you can expect from your inks. The yield figure has a significant effect on the ink cost within your estimates for large format and offset printing.)
data.value: (Note: Please contact your press supplier or calculate yourself the correct yield that you can expect from your inks. The yield figure has a significant effect on the ink cost within your estimates for large format and offset printing.)

data.name: Purchases value should not be blank
data.value: Purchases value should not be blank

data.name: Copy Black and White settings to Colour
data.value: Copy Black and White settings to Colour

data.name: 1. You can not delete a status that is currently ticked as in use within the system.
data.value: You can not delete a status that is currently ticked as in use within the system.

data.name: Select that file & click on the import button.
data.value: Select that file & click on the import button.

data.name: Run Speed value cannot be less than 1
data.value: Run Speed value cannot be less than 1

data.name: Please enter decimal value upto 4 decimals
data.value: Please enter decimal value upto 4 decimals

data.name: (For large format inks please use the yield cost type)
data.value: (For large format inks please use the yield cost type)

data.name: Please specify where you would like this category to appear on the Job Card
data.value: Please specify where you would like this category to appear on the Job Card

data.name: Don't allocate to any specific customers
data.value: Don't allocate to any specific customers

data.value: Set up Spoilage number of sheets

data.value: Prompt user to decide if stock should be added back to the system

data.name: Download the sample file & input your data as per columns laid in the file
data.value: Download the sample file & input your data as per columns laid in the file

data.name: Set this as starting value for the Estimates, Jobs, Purchases, Invoices and Delivery:
data.value: Set this as starting value for the Estimates, Jobs, Purchases, Invoices and Delivery:

data.name: Allow user to upload artwork file(max 3 files)
data.value: Allow user to upload artwork file(max 3 files)

data.name: In this instance eprint will treat each printed item as an individual item involving
data.value: In this instance eprint will treat each printed item as an individual item involving

data.name: Each time the stock falls below the re-order level.
data.value: Each time the stock falls below the re-order level.

data.value: Save workbook in a format that is compatible with Excel

data.value: If you are using external excel file, then All columns in the excel file

data.value: Check this box to sum the click charge rate b/w click zones

data.value: [Please separate multiple email addresses with a comma]
